changeSet.author: taller
changeSet.sql: UPDATE orden_trabajo SET valor_pactado = mano_obra WHERE valor_pactado IS NULL AND mano_obra IS NOT NULL
UPDATE orden_trabajo SET abono = subtotal WHERE abono IS NULL AND subtotal IS NOT NULL
UPDATE orden_trabajo SET saldo = (COALESCE(valor_pactado,0) - COALESCE(abono,0)) WHERE saldo IS NULL
